summary: Governance contract for an independently deployed serialized web-fiction runtime with deterministic registration boundaries.
purpose: Register the personal web-novel service in central governance while keeping runtime implementation, rendering behavior, and hosting outside ai-governance.

approval_boundary: medium for content-model, contract, and presentation policy adjustments within the declared runtime boundary
high for monetization activation, identity expansion, data-boundary change, or new external permission scope
forbidden_actions: Network-dependent verdict generation in the deterministic path
primary_users: service operators managing a separate runtime repository

start_conditions: Keep runtime code in /Users/wonyoung_choi/projects/personal-webnovel and link only contracts into ai-governance.
Update service registration and service package contracts in one change set.
steady_state: Retain contract-only governance artifacts in ai-governance.
Treat monetization activation and account system introduction as high-tier boundary changes.
failure_response: Freeze rollout if service package validation fails or runtime boundary is violated.
Remove or correct any contract entry that points to unmanaged runtime behavior.
Fallback to free-access metadata-only mode if monetization planning becomes non-compliant.
rollback_reference: Revert the latest personal-webnovel contract change set.
Re-run central validation to confirm registry and package integrity.
access_revocation: Rotate notify-provider credentials when provider integration is introduced.
Revoke operator access for untracked boundary expansion and record trace refs.

failure_modes: Email waitlist handling expands without an approved data-boundary review.
Future paywall activation bypasses central approval.
Presentation changes obscure the declared free-access baseline.
mandatory_controls: Human gate for monetization, identity, or external permission expansion.
Trace-linked validation on every governance change.

primary_artifacts: Limited email notify leads handled by the separate runtime
retention_policy: Retain only governance-relevant contract artifacts in ai-governance.
Keep email lead handling outside ai-governance and under runtime-specific controls.
Record only hashed or summarized evidence refs in central traces.

conditions: Export only stable governance decisions, not raw reader data.
Redact runtime-specific secrets or personal data before export.

access_controls: Owner or designated reviewer access only for governance artifacts.
No anonymous modification of service registration.

extension_baseline: Content rendering, MDX compilation, and notify delivery stay in the separate runtime repository.
Monetization hooks may exist in metadata only until a later approved activation.
permissions_scope: Least-privilege expansion only after explicit human review.

critical_metrics.notes: Central service registration and contract validation pass ratio.
Reader return intent target for serialized cadence.
Chapter route response p95 target for the external runtime.

error_budget: Freeze non-essential changes when validation or reader continuity signals burn more than half the budget early.

change_log.change: Registered the personal web-novel service as a contract-only governed runtime split.
